output: T2 is complete. The shared selected-clip contract now accepts optional shot metadata on both sides of the boundary: persisted frontend attachments support `shotId`/`shotName`, and backend selected-clip payloads support `shot_id`/`shot_name`. The change is additive-only, so legacy sessions, gallery-only attachments, and older request bodies remain valid. Relevant frontend and edge test modules passed, and the batch checkpoint was written.
